title: Fourth of July Cookout Costs Rise 4% Says Stew Leonard's CEO
title_cn: Stew Leonard 首席执行官表示 7 月 4 日野餐费用上涨 4%
summary: Stew Leonard Jr., President and CEO of Stew Leonard's grocery stores, discussed the recent 4% increase in the average cost of an Independence Day meal for 10, now $73.82. He emphasized that despite the rise, the per-person cost remains reasonable compared to dining out. The primary driver of the price increase is beef, with meat prices rising from $2.50 to $2.75 due to a 75-year low in cattle herd sizes and strong demand for protein. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warsh Using Strategic Ambiguity: Diczok
title_cn: 沃什利用战略模糊性：Diczok

title: Canada, Philippines Agree to Sign Trade Deal This Year, Grow Defense Ties
title_cn: 加拿大和菲律宾同意今年签署贸易协议，发展防务关系
summary: Canada and the Philippines plan to finalize a free trade agreement this year, and signed agreements to deepen cooperation on energy, defense, labor and migration, Prime Minister Mark Carney said Thursday.

title: World Cup Muni Spending An Accelerator: Kleinman
title_cn: 世界杯市政支出加速器：Kleinman
summary: Margot Kleinman, head of municipal research & portfolio manager at Nuveen, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Municipal bonds helped 11 US World Cup Host Cities fund upgrades to transportation hubs, airports, and enhance security. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Private Credit Is Betting on Consumer Debt at a Precarious Time
title_cn: 私人信贷在不稳定时期押注消费者债务
summary: Bloomberg's Rene Ismail joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." The private credit industry was dubbed “shadow banking” as it took business away from traditional lenders. Buy Now, Pay Later companies have been referred to as hawking “phantom debt” that falls outside Wall Street’s typical tracking methods. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Families Look For Affordable Summer Fun Amid Cost Crunch
title_cn: 在成本紧缩的情况下，家庭寻找负担得起的夏季乐趣
summary: Sky Zone CEO Dave Hoffman said that the trampoline park company is looking to help parents give their kids the summer they deserve with membership deals as families feel squeezed by higher prices. Hoffman said that his company's thesis is about prioritizing 'active and social play' for kids as they navigate a very online world post covid.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Korea Opens 24-Hour Won Trading at a Fraught Moment
title_cn: 韩国在令人担忧的时刻开启 24 小时韩元交易
summary: Deep inside a government complex in Sejong, about two hours from Seoul, a room known as “the box” is ground zero for South Korea’s currency anxieties.

title: World’s Worst-Performing Exchange ASX Bets on Outsider for Pivot
title_cn: 全球表现最差的交易所 ASX 押注局外人 Pivot
summary: When Anthony Attia takes the helm at Australia’s ASX Ltd., the world’s worst-performing stock exchange operator, he’ll need to launch straight into a battle to win over regulators and investors.

title: Blue Owl Imposes Redemption Caps Again
title_cn: 蓝猫头鹰再次实施赎回上限
summary:
Bloomberg's Sinead Cruise joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." For the second straight quarter, two Blue Owl Capital private credit funds were hit with the industry’s largest redemption requests, forcing the manager to again cap withdrawals.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dow Average Hits Peak as Jobs Ease Fed-Hike Worry: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着就业缓解美联储加息担忧，道指触及峰值：市场结束
summary: A sharp slowdown in the US jobs market spurred gains in most stocks on Wall Street amid speculation the Federal Reserve won’t be forced to raise interest rates any time soon.

title: ‘Taylor Swift Tax’ Stirs Bad Blood With Rhode Island Homeowners
title_cn: “泰勒斯威夫特税”激起了罗德岛州房主的不满
summary: Bloomberg News Boston money and power reporter Greg Ryan said that a Rhode Island tax increase on second homes is not just impacting the wealthiest residents like Taylor Swift, but that many residents with family properties worry about the impact on their finances. The Rhode Island tax comes as some other cities and states move to tax second homes at a higher rate, like the pied-a-terre tax proposed in New York City by Mayor Zohran Mamdani.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Erase Jobs Report-Related Gains as Semis Pull Back
title_cn: 随着半成品回落，美国股市抹去了就业报告相关的涨幅
summary: US equities finished the holiday-shortened week little changed, erasing their earlier advance as technology stocks trailed the S&P 500 Index for a second-straight day.

title: Stocks Give up Jobs Report Gains | Closing Bell
title_cn: 股市放弃就业报告收益|结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Bailey Lipschultz, Norah Mulinda, and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TD Securities: Data Now Guiding Central Bank Rate Paths
title_cn: 道明证券：数据正在指导央行利率路径
summary: Pooja Kumra, Senior European and UK Rates Strategist at TD Securities, discussed the recent comments from Federal Reserve official Kevin Warsh and their implications for market expectations. Kumra noted that while Warsh acknowledged easing inflation and narrowing inflation expectations, his remarks were less hawkish than those from the June Fed meeting. She highlighted the absence of forward rate guidance from the Fed and other central banks, emphasizing that market data and conditions will now primarily drive rate decisions. With the upcoming release of the Fed minutes, Kumra expressed interest in insights on internal Fed deliberations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Bets Rallying Markets Will Absorb Every Market Blow
title_cn: 华尔街押注市场反弹将吸收每一次市场打击
summary: Wall Street is kicking off the second half of 2026 with fresh conviction: shrugging off one shock after another, markets are set to grind even higher.

title: Kochugovindan: Expect Fed to Hold Rates For Rest of 2026
title_cn: Kochugovindan：预计美联储将在 2026 年余下时间维持利率不变
summary: The heads of major central banks discussed changing the inflation outlook at the ECB's annual forum in Portugal. Fed chair Kevin Warsh said price risks have come down in recent weeks, and that his goal remains to bring inflation back to the US central bank's 2% target. Sree Kochugovindan, Senior Research Economist at Aberdeen Investments, spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on the inflation gauge. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Real Yield 7/2/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: JPMorgan Asset Management Fixed Income Portfolio Manager Kelsey Berro, Firm's Head of Cross-Asset Market Strategy Chief Investment Office Matthew Diczok, CreditSights Global Head of Credit Strategy Winnie Cisar, Invesco Head of IG Credit of North America Matt Brill, and Nuveen Head of Municipal Research & Portfolio Manager Margot Kleinman. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Spotify Challenges Prediction Markets After Song Chart Rigging
title_cn: Spotify 在歌曲排行榜操纵后挑战预测市场
summary: Spotify has asked Kalshi and Polymarket to remove its logo and clarify that neither company has a partnership with the streaming service after it identified users manipulating rankings that are tied to prediction market bets.

title: Screwworm's Return to the US Sets up Yearslong Fight
title_cn: 螺旋虫重返美国引发长达数年的斗争
summary: For the first time in about fifty years, the New World screwworm is back in US livestock. Bloomberg's Ilena Peng explains how the parasitic fly will affect beef prices and how the USDA is responding. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Jumps After Soft US Job Numbers Ease Fed Rate Hike Fears
title_cn: 美国就业数据疲软缓解美联储加息担忧后金价上涨
summary: Gold climbed after weak US job numbers eased fears that the Federal Reserve may raise interest rates this year to tackle inflation.

title: Brown University’s Rating Outlook Lowered to Negative by Moody’s
title_cn: 穆迪将布朗大学的评级展望下调至负面
summary: Brown University had the outlook on its credit rating lowered to negative on Thursday by Moody’s Ratings, which cited expense pressures facing the institution.

title: JPMorgan Loses Battle Over Charlie Javice’s Legal Expenses
title_cn: 摩根大通在查理·贾维斯的法律费用问题上败诉
summary: A Delaware judge said JPMorgan Chase & Co. failed to show that Charlie Javice‘s $74 million in legal fees were clearly excessive, ruling the bank must continue to pay her bills.

title: Oil Fluctuates as Crude Flows Surge Through Persian Gulf
title_cn: 随着波斯湾原油流量激增，石油价格波动
summary: Oil prices steadied near pre-war lows as traders covered some bearish bets ahead of a US holiday weekend.

title: Barclays Pulls Near $1 Billion Debt Deal for Sound Physicians
title_cn: 巴克莱银行为 Sound Physicians 取消了近 10 亿美元的债务交易
summary: Barclays Plc has withdrawn a near $1 billion financing for Sound Inpatient Physicians Inc. from the debt capital markets, marking one of the few leveraged loan deals to be pulled this year.

title: Hamburger Costs Rise 14% From Last July 4 Says Wells Fargo
title_cn: 富国银行称，汉堡成本自去年 7 月 4 日起上涨 14%
summary: Robin Wenzel, Head of Wells Fargo Agri-Food Institute joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss their bbq report: Stay Close, Grill Big: Why Backyard BBQs Are Taking Over Summer 2026.' In the report they break down how a party of ten is expected to cost an average of $161, with ribs serving as a prime choice for protein as well as the rising cost of food for families across the US. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Invesco’s Brill Gives SpaceX Bond a Red Card for ‘Very Sloppy’ Performance
title_cn: Invesco 的 Brill 因 SpaceX Bond 表现“非常马虎”而给其红牌
summary: Invesco Advisers Inc.’s head of investment-grade credit for North America slammed SpaceX’s inaugural bond sale on Thursday for a “very sloppy” secondary market performance.

title: Trump Financial Disclosure Shows 21,000 Trades in 2025
title_cn: 特朗普财务披露显示 2025 年将进行 21,000 笔交易
summary: President Donald Trump made more than 21,000 securities trades in his first year back in office, often in intense bursts tied to market events he created.

title: Genuine Parts Is Said to Receive O’Reilly Interest for Auto Unit
title_cn: 据说奥莱利对汽车部门的原厂零件感兴趣
summary: Genuine Parts Co. has attracted a cash bid for its auto-parts arm from O’Reilly Automotive Inc. as it seeks to refocus on its industrials business, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Carney Keeps North BC Tanker Ban, Signaling Alberta’s Pipeline Will Go South
title_cn: 卡尼维持不列颠哥伦比亚省北部油轮禁令，表明阿尔伯塔省的管道将向南延伸
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney announced a deal with British Columbia that keeps an oil tanker ban in place for Canada’s north coast, and commits billions of dollars in federal funding for energy, mining and transportation projects.

title: Market Uncertainty Grows as Stocks Retrace Gains Following Jobs Report
title_cn: 就业报告公布后股市回撤涨幅，市场不确定性加剧
summary: Jim Caron, CIO of the Portfolio Solutions Group at Morgan Stanley Investment Management, discusses the current state of the stock market heading into the second half of the year. Despite significant gains earlier in the year, Caron addresses whether investors should remain overweight in equities amid recent volatility. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Crusoe in Talks to Raise $3 Billion in Round That May Triple Firm’s Value
title_cn: Crusoe 正在洽谈一轮融资 30 亿美元，这可能会使公司价值增加三倍
summary: Crusoe, the data center upstart with contracts to supply AI computing power for the likes of Meta Platforms Inc. and Oracle Corp., is in talks to raise about $3 billion in a funding round that may triple the company’s valuation, people familiar with the situation said.

title: CEO of Blueprint Capital Advisors Discusses Private Capital Strategies
title_cn: Blueprint Capital Advisors 首席执行官讨论私募资本策略
summary: Jacob Walthour Jr., CEO of Blueprint Capital Advisors, shares his expertise on account management and fund-to-fund services within private capital strategies. The discussion took place against the backdrop of ongoing redemption tensions in the private credit market, highlighting challenges and opportunities in managing private capital investments. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Korean AI Rout Drags Emerging Stocks to Three-Week Low
title_cn: 韩国人工智能溃败将新兴股市拖至三周低点
summary: Most developing-world currencies rallied on Thursday after weaker-than-expected US employment data prompted investors to scale back bets that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates as soon as this month.

title: UBS Sees Tech Sector Resilience Despite Meta
title_cn: 尽管有元数据影响，瑞银仍看到科技行业的韧性
summary: Nadia Lovell of UBS discussed the recent volatility in tech stocks amid speculation about a strategic pivot by Meta. While some market participants worry that hyperscalers may have overbuilt cloud capacity without corresponding monetization, Lovell views the potential offloading of excess capacity as a constructive move that could improve capital efficiency and margins over time. She emphasized that demand for cloud services remains strong, citing robust cloud revenue growth among hyperscalers and increasing enterprise adoption rates in the U.S. Despite the recent sell-off in certain cloud-related stocks, Lovell believes capital expenditure plans for this year and next are largely set, with limited upside but no immediate slowdown. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FBI Probes Whether Alarum Unit Is Behind Co-Opted Home Devices
title_cn: FBI 调查警报装置是否是选定家用设备的幕后黑手
summary: The FBI is investigating whether a subsidiary of the data-collection firm Alarum Technologies Ltd. had a role in linking customers’ home internet devices without their consent into a network that people can use to disguise their locations, according to documents seen by Bloomberg News and confirmed by people familiar with the situation.

title: Software Developers Rethink Apps for Their Newest Users: AI Agents
title_cn: 软件开发人员重新考虑针对最新用户的应用程序：人工智能代理
summary: Potential adjustments range from rethinking pricing and permissions to overhauling designs

title: ElevenLabs in Talks for Tender Offer at $22 Billion Valuation
title_cn: ElevenLabs 正在就估值 220 亿美元的要约收购进行谈判
summary: ElevenLabs has held early talks with investors to let employees sell shares in a secondary offering that would value the artificial intelligence startup at roughly $22 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Microsoft's 6,000-Person AI Push
title_cn: 微软6000人AI推动
summary: Microsoft is building a 6,000-person AI deployment team to help businesses implement artificial intelligence.  Bloomberg' Tech co-host Ed Ludlow explains why the move mirrors the forward deployment engineer model pioneered by Palantir and adopted by AWS, and why hands-on AI implementation could be the key to unlocking enterprise ROI. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tesla Deliveries Jump 25% | Bloomberg Tech 7/02/2026
title_cn: 特斯拉交付量跃升 25% |彭博科技 7/02/2026
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down reports that OpenAI is holding early-stage discussions about giving the US government a 5% equity stake. Plus, Tesla's delivery numbers rose 25% from a year ago, beating Wall Street's expectations by a wide margin. And, he CEO of Microsoft's commercial business discusses the tech giant's plan to set up a new organization with 6,000 employees to help businesses use AI. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jobs Report Signals Cooling Labor Market | Open Interest 7/2/2026
title_cn: 就业报告表明劳动力市场正在降温未平仓合约 7/2/2026
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." US hiring slows sharply in June as Wall Street weighs what comes next. The Nasdaq fights back as Meta reshapes the global AI race, and OpenAI is reportedly considering giving the U.S. government a 5% stake. White House NEC Director Kevin Hassett reacts live to the jobs report, BlackRock's Rick Rieder breaks down the market impact, Revelio Labs explains how AI is creating jobs despite slower hiring, and Bridgepoint's $1.4 billion real estate bet points to a potential decade-long investment boom. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nuclear Reactor Powers Nvidia AI Chip in US First
title_cn: 核反应堆首次在美国为 Nvidia 人工智能芯片提供动力
summary: Valar Atomics, a California-based nuclear startup, generated power from an advanced reactor to run an Nvidia AI chip. While just a trickle of electricity was produced, it’s the first time a next-gen reactor has done so in the US. On the heels of a demonstration of Valar’s Ward 250 reactor connecting to the Nvidia Blackwell chip at the company’s site in Utah, Valar Atomics CEO Isaiah Taylor joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft Shifts Strategy on Enterprise AI
title_cn: 微软改变企业人工智能战略
summary: Microsoft is mobilizing 6,000 employees in a new unit aimed at helping enterprise clients better utilize AI. Judson Althoff, CEO of Microsoft's commercial business, discusses what is driving this move and what impact Microsoft hopes to see. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IQM CEO Explains Quantum's Big Opportunity
title_cn: IQM 首席执行官解释量子的巨大机遇
summary: IQM Quantum Computers CEO Jan Goetz joined Open Interest to explain why his company chose a Nasdaq listing, why quantum computing could solve problems impossible for today's supercomputers, and why he believes the AI boom is accelerating the future of quantum technology. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kayne Anderson CEO on Bridgepoint Deal
title_cn: 凯恩·安德森 (Kayne Anderson) 首席执行官谈 Bridgepoint 交易
summary: Bridgepoint is making a $1.4 billion bet on US real estate. Kayne Anderson Real Estate Co-Founder and CEO Al Rabil says it's all about preparing for a "10-year supercycle." He joins Open Interest to explain why AI infrastructure, healthcare real estate, and long-term demographic trends are creating massive investment opportunities, and why the merger preserves his firm's autonomy while unlocking far more capital. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tesla's Big Beat Raises Questions
title_cn: 特斯拉的大节奏引发了疑问
summary: Tesla stunned Wall Street with a massive second-quarter delivery beat, While production also topped forecasts, the company offered virtually no commentary or explanation, leaving investors with more questions than answers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canada’s Pembina Advances Gas-Fired Data Center Project
title_cn: 加拿大 Pembina 推进燃气数据中心项目
summary: Pembina Pipeline Corp. will move ahead with a project build a C$4.6 billion ($3.2 billion) gas-fired electricity plant that will power a data center project in Alberta.

title: Microsoft Mobilizes 6,000 Workers to Help Customers Adopt AI
title_cn: 微软动员 6,000 名员工帮助客户采用人工智能
summary: Microsoft Corp. is setting up a new organization with 6,000 employees to help businesses with the technical and strategic work of deploying artificial intelligence.

title: China’s Kling AI Raises $2 Billion to Expand AI Video
title_cn: 中国 Kling AI 融资 20 亿美元拓展 AI 视频业务
summary: China’s Kling AI has raised an initial $2 billion in venture capital funding as the spinoff from Kuaishou Technology seeks to expand its video AI operations.

title: AI Race Fuels New Fears of Crowded Trading
title_cn: 人工智能竞赛加剧了对拥挤交易的新担忧
summary:
Asian semiconductor stocks tumbled on Thursday, tracking tech losses on Wall Street after Meta Platforms Inc.’s plan to develop a business that would sell access to AI computing power raised worries about overcapacity.
Brian Belski, CEO and founder at Humilis Investments, discusses the recent tech sector rout and what stocks he is keeping an eye on. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SAP Restricts Hiring, Travel to Fund ‘Significant’ AI Push
title_cn: SAP 限制招聘和差旅以资助“重大”人工智能推广
summary: SAP SE said it will cut back hiring and travel to save costs as Europe’s largest software company devotes more resources to developing artificial intelligence technologies and fending off new competitors.

title: Anthropic in Talks With Samsung for Custom AI Chip: Information
title_cn: Anthropic 正在与三星洽谈定制 AI 芯片：信息
summary: Anthropic PBC is in talks with Samsung Electronics Co. to be a manufacturing partner for a custom artificial intelligence chip, the Information said, citing people familiar with the plan.

title: Why Marlinspike Is Investing in America's Defense Boom
title_cn: 为什么马林斯派克投资于美国的国防繁荣
summary: Marlinspike Partners just raised an oversubscribed $127 million Fund II to "rearm America," the latest sign that investors are piling into defense startups. Marlinspike co-founder and CEO Neil Keegan, who also served six years as a US Navy Surface Warfare Officer, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Congo Plans First Stock Market as AI Mineral Boom Draws Interest
title_cn: 随着人工智能矿产热潮引起人们的兴趣，刚果计划建立第一个股票市场
summary: The Democratic Republic of Congo is drawing up plans for its first stock exchange as it seeks to attract more investment to an economy that’s benefiting from soaring demand for minerals critical to the artificial intelligence buildout.

title: SpaceX Analyst Debut Set to Test $2.2 Trillion Valuation
title_cn: SpaceX 分析师首次亮相将测试 2.2 万亿美元估值
summary: Investors in SpaceX have been largely flying blind since the company’s record-breaking IPO last month, with few financial projections to help determine what the stock is actually worth.

title: South Africa’s Grocery War Shifts From Search to AI Conversation
title_cn: 南非的杂货战争从搜索转向人工智能对话
summary: South Africa’s online grocery battle is entering a new phase where the competition is no longer just about delivering groceries faster, but rather about making shopping itself almost disappear.

title: How Phone Culture Is Reshaping Chinese Society
title_cn: 手机文化如何重塑中国社会
summary:
Think smartphones dominate American culture? China may have taken the mobile-first lifestyle to another level.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Dan Wang, author of Breakneck, joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss how phone culture is reshaping Chinese society — from ordering a croissant for delivery in minutes to livestreaming shopping trips at the mall. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Los conciertos de Bad Bunny muestran cómo la migración latina está impulsando la economía de España
title_cn: 坏兔子的音乐会展示了拉丁移民如何推动西班牙经济
summary: En los últimos tres años, el país ha acogido a más de tres millones de personas, muchas de ellas procedentes de América Latina. Estas personas han contribuido a convertir a España en la economía de la eurozona de más rápido crecimiento.

title: Texas Governor Appoints GOP Candidate to State’s Top Finance Job
title_cn: 德克萨斯州州长任命共和党候选人担任该州最高金融职位
summary: Texas Governor Greg Abbott has appointed a new state comptroller of public accounts: conservative firebrand Don Huffines, who’s also the Republican candidate for the comptroller’s office in this year’s election in November.

title: Anti-Establishment Election Wins Are Reshaping Political Playbooks
title_cn: 反建制派的选举胜利正在重塑政治剧本
summary: The progressive wing of the Democratic party turns to its next potential upset.

title: Krugman Calls Labor Market Soft, Disturbed by Warsh's View
title_cn: 克鲁格曼称劳动力市场疲软，受到沃什观点的困扰
summary: Nobel laureate Paul Krugman, a research professor at the City University of New York's Graduate Center, says all jobs data is "noisy" when reacting to the June US employment report. Speaking on "Bloomberg The Close," Krugman also says he is "disturbed" by Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh's point of view on monetary policy and warns that the Supreme Court's Trump v. Slaughter ruling gives too much discretionary power to President Donald Trump. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Hiring Slows Sharply | Balance of Power 7/2/2026
title_cn: 美国招聘急剧放缓|权力平衡 2026 年 7 月 2 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest news. On today's show, Republican Congressman Jason Smith, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Beyond Politics Podcast Host Matt Robison and Democratic Congresswoman Suzan DelBene. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Court Upholds Peru Control of Chinese Port in Win for the US
title_cn: 法院维持秘鲁对中国港口的控制权，为美国赢得胜利
summary: A Peruvian court ordered the government to oversee a Chinese-owned port near Lima, helping US efforts to curb Beijing’s growing power in the region.

title: Burnham Floats Warehouse Tax Hike To Fund Cuts For High Street
title_cn: 伯纳姆提出提高仓库税，为高街削减资金提供资金
summary: Andy Burnham said he would increase business rates on warehouse-based companies in order to lower costs for high street shops and bars as he set out details of what he would do if he continues on his path to becoming the next prime minister.

title: Warsh’s Calendar in First Week as Fed Chair Shows Staff Meetings
title_cn: 沃什就任美联储主席第一周的日历显示了员工会议
summary: Kevin Warsh’s calendar for his first week in office as Federal Reserve chairman shows a diary that was mostly busy with internal staff meetings, with the exception of a handful of others that included breakfast with Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.

title: OpenAI Proposes Giving the US Government a 5% Stake, FT Says
title_cn: 英国《金融时报》称 OpenAI 提议给予美国政府 5% 的股份
summary:
OpenAI has begun preliminary discussions about giving the US government a 5% stake in the ChatGPT-developer, the Financial Times reported, citing two people familiar with the talks.
OpenAI Chief Executive Officer Sam Altman and other executives proposed that move as part of a broader arrangement under which Washington would hold 5% of each of the leading US AI developers, the FT reported. Bloomberg's Mike Shepard joins to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Senate Democrat Demands Records on DOJ, IRS Settlement Planning
title_cn: 参议院民主党人要求提供司法部和国税局和解计划的记录
summary: A top Democrat on the Senate Judiciary Committee is requesting that administration officials disclose records of any federal agency coordination on a settlement agreement with the IRS that shields President Donald Trump and family members from federal tax audits.

title: Top US General for Europe Resigns as Trump Squeezes NATO Allies
title_cn: 特朗普挤压北约盟友，美国驻欧洲最高将军辞职
summary: The top US commander for Europe and Africa stepped down on Thursday, following through on a plan that caught military leaders by surprise and sending another signal that the Trump administration wants to scale back its defense commitment to the continent.

title: German Reform Plan Could Lift 2027 GDP Above 1%, Merz Says
title_cn: 默茨称德国改革计划可能使 2027 年 GDP 增长 1% 以上
summary: The package of reforms just laid out by Germany’s coalition could lift the nation’s GDP above 1% in 2027, German Chancellor Friedrich Merz told ARD.

title: Guinea Court Reduces Ex-Prime Minister’s Corruption Sentence
title_cn: 几内亚法院减轻前总理腐败判决
summary: A Guinean appeals court reduced former Prime Minister Ibrahima Kassory Fofana’s prison sentence to three years and nine months, allowing him to remain free after he spent four years in pretrial detention on illicit enrichment and money laundering charges.

title: Can Trump Still Fire Lisa Cook After Her Supreme Court Win?
title_cn: 最高法院获胜后，特朗普还能解雇丽莎·库克吗？
summary: For now, Lisa Cook, the member of the Federal Reserve’s Board of Governors who Donald Trump attempted to fire in 2025, has scored another victory over the US president. A closely divided Supreme Court ruled on June 29 that she can stay in her job while she fights his bid to oust her over unproven mortgage fraud allegations that she denies. The justices didn’t make a decision about whether Trump ultimately could remove Cook from office, however, only that she had to receive a reasonable opportuni

title: US Moves to Halt Energy Savings Requirements Lambasted by Trump
title_cn: 美国暂停节能要求的举措遭到特朗普的严厉批评
summary: The Trump administration is moving to halt mandatory energy conservation standards for appliances ranging from refrigerators to washing machines, taking aim at some restrictions that have been criticized by the president himself.

title: Britain’s ‘Frustrating’ Search for New Chief to Fix Stats Crisis
title_cn: 英国“令人沮丧”地寻找新主席来解决统计危机
summary: One of Britain’s most senior statisticians said she’s frustrated by the long wait to install a new chief who can fix a crisis of confidence around the country’s economic data.

title: Protests Over Kushner-Linked Project Turn Violent in Albania
title_cn: 阿尔巴尼亚对库什纳相关项目的抗议演变成暴力活动
summary: Albanian police used water cannon and tear gas to disperse protesters in Tirana, in one of the most tense confrontations since rallies over coastal development projects linked to Jared Kushner began a month ago.

title: Chile endurece la supervisión migratoria tras caso de niños haitianos
title_cn: 海地儿童事件后智利加强移民监管
summary: Aunque los menores desaparecidos fueron localizados rápidamente, la conmoción por el caso provocó un mayor escrutinio sobre una comunidad que alguna vez encontró refugio en el país sudamericano.

title: Navy Withholds Northrop Payments Over Tardy Missile, GAO Says
title_cn: 美国政府问责局表示，海军扣留了诺斯罗普公司因迟到导弹而支付的款项
summary: The US Navy has withheld payments from Northrop Grumman Corp. over delays to fielding an upgraded air-to-ground missile designed to destroy enemy air-defense radar, congressional auditors said.

title: Mexico’s Export-Led Economy at Risk With Annual USMCA Reviews
title_cn: 墨西哥出口导向型经济面临年度 USMCA 审查的风险
summary: For years, Mexico’s pitch to investors rested on a simple promise: build here, sell to the US.

title: AI Anxiety, AI Cash Are Powering This Election Cycle
title_cn: 人工智能焦虑、人工智能现金正在推动这一选举周期
summary: “Claude, how should I vote in 2026?” On today’s Big Take podcast, the money, candidates and anxiety fueling the first AI election. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: De la Espriella Says Colombia Will Seek to Refinance Debt
title_cn: 德拉埃斯普里埃拉表示哥伦比亚将寻求债务再融资
summary: Colombian President-elect Abelardo de la Espriella said his incoming administration will seek to refinance the nation’s debt to extend maturities and lower borrowing costs.

title: European Nations Now Believe Some Hormuz Fees Are Inevitable
title_cn: 欧洲国家现在认为一些霍尔木兹收费是不可避免的
summary: Some leading European powers now accept that ships transiting the vital Strait of Hormuz will have to pay fees to Iran and Oman, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: First US Hypersonic Weapon Program Faces Further Delay, GAO Says
title_cn: 美国政府问责局表示，美国首个高超音速武器计划面临进一步推迟
summary: The US’s first hypersonic weapon, already at least two years late for deployment in the field, is facing delays yet again — this time over unresolved production issues, according to congressional auditors.

title: Boeing Made Progress on Air Force One Modifications, GAO Says
title_cn: 美国政府问责局表示，波音公司在空军一号改装方面取得了进展
summary: Boeing Co. reduced some of the technical challenges dogging its delayed delivery of two jets that will serve as Air Force One, according to congressional auditors.

title: Cuba’s Bold Free-Market Turn Fails to Convince US It’s Ready to Change
title_cn: 古巴大胆的自由市场转向未能让美国相信它已做好改变的准备
summary: Cuba is struggling to convince the Trump administration that its most ambitious economic reforms in decades are enough to spark the changes the US is demanding.

title: India Plans to Expand Oil Reserves to Guard Against Price Spikes
title_cn: 印度计划扩大石油储备以防范价格飙升
summary: India plans to build larger oil inventories, expand storage capacity and deepen supply partnerships to hedge against the kind of price volatility seen during the Iran war.

title: Death Toll Rises to 20 After Massive Russian Air Attack on Kyiv
title_cn: 俄罗斯大规模空袭基辅后死亡人数上升至20人
summary: The number of fatalities increased to 20 in Kyiv following overnight Russian missile and drone attacks on the Ukrainian capital that were among the most intense of the year so far.

title: Ocasio-Cortez Backs Progressive El-Sayed in Michigan Senate Race
title_cn: 奥卡西奥-科尔特斯在密歇根州参议员竞选中支持进步派埃尔-赛义德
summary: Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez has endorsed Michigan candidate Abdul El-Sayed in that state’s US Senate primary, throwing another progressive voice behind him in the race to face off against Republican Mike Rogers.
